checkin.journal:
Felt I needed more sleep in morning, but alarm was for 7:00 tomorrow is going to be even earlier - lets see how this will go
Went to practice golf with Tim - we did a class on driver shots. I still feel I suck big balls on that lol 😂 Not that I am particularly good at other shots. It was alright, could be worse i suppose haha
My hip hurt but I managed to get pain down, put a pillow under the table where I sit. I think my hip pain comes mostly from there
Broke pinball record 59M Star wars 
Spoke
